source_pr.title: executor: move some test into writetest
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #xxx

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

Why do we need to move some tests into another folder? We have too much test cases put into the folder. Bazel can split test cases into shard. Shard can run the test cases parallel. But bad news is that the max sharding is 50, so that too much test cases lead to put too much cases into shard. More test cases in the shard. More retry because of unstable tests. so we need to isolate the test cases by move some test into new folder.
 
### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: The Bazel `executor_test` target had too many test files; shard splitting is capped (max 50), so shards became large and required more retries due to unstable tests.
failure_signature: Bazel executor unit tests need frequent retries due to oversized shards (shard_count cap vs too many tests).
root_cause_explanation: The instability here is caused by test-suite organization and Bazel sharding limits: the `executor_test` target accumulated too many test files, but Bazel sharding is capped (max 50), so each shard becomes large and CI needs more retries when unstable tests are mixed together. This PR stabilizes execution by splitting out `write_test.go` into a dedicated `executor/writetest` test target (with its own `TestMain` setup), tuning shard counts, and shrinking the remaining `executor_test` target so it can run under a shorter timeout.
fix_pattern: Split an overgrown Bazel `go_test` target into smaller targets (move write-related tests into `executor/writetest`, add dedicated `TestMain`, tune shard_count/timeouts) to reduce retries from unstable shard composition.

evidence: evidence: Why do we need to move some tests into another folder? We have too much test cases put into the folder. Bazel can split test cases into shard. Shard can run the test cases parallel. But bad news is that the max sharding is 50, so that too much test cases lead to put too much cases into shard. More test cases in the shard. More retry because of unstable te...
